# Redeeming a Gift Card

To redeem a gift card at Acme Shop, add items to your cart and proceed to the checkout page, where you will find a field to enter your gift card code. The gift card balance will be deducted from your total purchase amount, and any remaining balance can be used for future transactions. Ensure your gift card is valid and has not expired; it typically has a one-year validity. Some items may not be eligible for purchase with a gift card, and if you encounter issues with the gift card code, verify for errors or contact customer support for help.
